message:
test(trauma): fix E2E test isolation and error format handling

- Use unique IDs/patterns per test to prevent cross-test pollution
- Make error format checks robust (stringified payload inspection)
- Fix imports test to use truly unique suffix patterns
- All 27 trauma CLI E2E tests now pass
